## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or deployment-specific URLs added
- [ ] `resources/server/` is untouched (or only `.gitkeep` / `README.md`)
- [ ] Screenshots / GIFs attached for UI changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for user-visible changes)
